before.risk: UI output could still produce a generic landing, dashboard, rigid timeline or decorative map.

improvement: The screen now has explicit two-panel composition.
The map path is defined as soft, organic and slightly serpentine.
The map background is defined as warm_surface with subtle abstract texture.
Emotional progression is specified without becoming landscape or motivation art.
Quality block criteria now include hard timeline, decorative map, landscape, dashboard, marketing hero and extra sections.

remaining_restrictions: Quality Pack must still validate cognitive load.
Composer must convert the UI Spec into a clean final prompt without audit/log/GitHub content.
No image generation until final prompt passes judge.
